bio: I'm a freelance journalist covering consumer news, business, personal finance and social affairs. My work has been published extensively in The Independent and Good Housekeeping, as well as Byline Times, Metro, Refinery29 and more.

As a News and Investigations Reporter for MoneySavingExpert.com (MSE), I worked on award-winning news stories, guides and campaigns that advocated on behalf of consumers. I pitched and researched MSE's Carer's Allowance campaign, which contributed to policy change, and investigated the cashback site Complete Savings, which led to their misleading adverts being banned and consumers recovering thousands of pounds.
contactBody: If you would like to work with me, or you have a story to share, please drop me a line.
